metadata.title: Graph Context for Claude Code
metadata.description: Graph Context for Claude Code Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Port for the IDE WebSocket server. Leave 0 or empty for a random port.
ast.target: IDE WebSocket 服务器的端口。留空或设为 0 表示使用随机端口。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Graph Context for Claude Code: requires a desktop file-system vault
ast.target: Claude Code 的图谱上下文：需要桌面文件系统库

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Graph Context for Claude Code: disconnected
ast.target: Claude Code 的图谱上下文：已断开连接

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the currently selected text and position in the active Obsidian editor. Returns cursor position if nothing selected.
ast.target: 返回活动 Obsidian 编辑器中当前选中的文本和位置。如果未选中任何内容，则返回光标位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the most recent non-empty selection in the active Obsidian editor.
ast.target: 返回活动 Obsidian 编辑器中最近一次非空的选区。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 返回工作区（库）的根文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the list of currently open editors with their file paths and active flag.
ast.target: 返回当前打开的编辑器列表及其文件路径和活动标志。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 中打开一个文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Opens a diff view of proposed file contents in Obsidian for the user to accept or reject.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 中打开一个差异视图，显示建议的文件内容，供用户接受或拒绝。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the current selection state enriched with heading path, frontmatter, embed expansions, wikilink summaries, and backlinks.
ast.target: 返回当前选区状态，并附加标题路径、前置信息、嵌入扩展、维基链接摘要和反向链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the full note at the given vault-absolute path enriched with context (embeds expanded, wikilinks summarized, backlinks).
ast.target: 返回给定库绝对路径下的完整笔记，并附加上下文（嵌入已扩展、维基链接已摘要、反向链接）。
